subcodes.first_line: O thou who art lost in the wilderness of the love of God, beseech Him that in this brief span of life in this faithless world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای گمگشته بادیه محبت الله از خدا بخواه که در این مدت قلیله از عمر دنیای بی وفا
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual transformation
